toxicity.toxic_parts: Latex (yellow part under the leaf skin)

natural_remedies.title: Soothing burn gel
natural_remedies.instructions: Apply directly to the burn 2 to 3 times a day.

natural_remedies.title: Hydrating face mask
natural_remedies.instructions: Mix and apply for 15 minutes before rinsing.

natural_remedies.title: Scalp treatment for dandruff
natural_remedies.instructions: Massage into scalp, leave for 30 minutes, then rinse with mild shampoo.

natural_remedies.title: Sunburn relief spray
natural_remedies.instructions: Mix in a spray bottle, shake well, and mist over sunburned skin.

natural_remedies.title: Digestive juice for heartburn
natural_remedies.instructions: Blend and drink once daily on an empty stomach.

natural_remedies.title: Acne spot treatment
natural_remedies.instructions: Apply as a paste to blemishes overnight, rinse in the morning.

natural_remedies.title: Detox drink
natural_remedies.instructions: Drink on an empty stomach in the morning to aid digestion.

natural_remedies.title: Sore throat gargle
natural_remedies.instructions: Gargle for 30 seconds, 2-3 times daily. Do not swallow.

natural_remedies.title: Skin brightening scrub
natural_remedies.instructions: Gently exfoliate face, rinse after 5 minutes. Avoid sun exposure after use.

natural_remedies.title: Immune-boosting shot
natural_remedies.instructions: Mix and take 1 tbsp daily during cold season.

natural_remedies.title: Grease-cutting cleaner
natural_remedies.instructions: Steep peels in vinegar for 2 weeks, dilute with water, and use as a spray.

natural_remedies.title: Hair lightening rinse
natural_remedies.instructions: Spray on hair, sit in sun for 30 mins, then rinse. Condition after.

natural_remedies.title: Nutritious bean soup
natural_remedies.instructions: Boil and consume for a fiber-rich meal.

natural_remedies.title: Protein-packed bean patties
natural_remedies.instructions: Shape into patties, pan-fry until golden. Serve as a meat alternative.

natural_remedies.title: Blood sugar-balancing bean salad
natural_remedies.instructions: Toss ingredients and eat 3-4 times weekly to stabilize glucose levels.

natural_remedies.title: Digestive bean broth
natural_remedies.instructions: Simmer spices in aquafaba for 10 mins. Drink warm to ease bloating.

natural_remedies.title: Bean flour face scrub
natural_remedies.instructions: Gently massage onto skin, rinse after 5 mins. Exfoliates gently.

natural_remedies.title: Heart-healthy bean dip
natural_remedies.instructions: Blend into a paste. Consume regularly to support cholesterol levels.

natural_remedies.title: Digestive mint tea
natural_remedies.instructions: Steep for 5-10 minutes and drink after meals.

natural_remedies.title: Headache relief compress
natural_remedies.instructions: Soak cloth in mint-infused cold water, apply to forehead for 15 minutes.

natural_remedies.title: Congestion-clearing steam
natural_remedies.instructions: Inhale the steam for 5-10 minutes with a towel over your head.

natural_remedies.title: Energy-boosting mint water
natural_remedies.instructions: Infuse overnight. Drink throughout the day for natural energy.

natural_remedies.title: Anti-itch mosquito bite paste
natural_remedies.instructions: Mix into paste, apply to bites for instant relief.

natural_remedies.title: Mint mouthwash for fresh breath
natural_remedies.instructions: Boil, strain, and use as a gargle after cooling.

natural_remedies.title: Cough syrup
natural_remedies.instructions: Mix and take one spoon twice a day.

natural_remedies.title: Pumpkin soup
natural_remedies.instructions: Cook and blend into a nutritious soup.

natural_remedies.title: Refreshing rose water
natural_remedies.instructions: Boil, strain, and use as a toner.

natural_remedies.title: Antioxidant face mask
natural_remedies.instructions: Apply to the face for 15 minutes, then rinse.

natural_remedies.title: Pain-relief pepper paste
natural_remedies.instructions: Apply cautiously to painful areas.

natural_remedies.title: Relaxing jasmine tea
natural_remedies.instructions: Steep for 5 minutes and drink before bed.

natural_remedies.title: Ginger tea
natural_remedies.instructions: Boil ginger, add lemon and honey, drink warm.
